title: Define JSON configuration contracts
description: Replace ad hoc env-only configuration with typed global/project JSON configuration contracts for LLM settings.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN config tests import src/config.ts THEN GlobalConfig and ProjectConfig shapes support llm.provider, baseUrl, apiKey, model, and timeoutMs; WHEN project config includes apiKey THEN validation rejects it; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:12
review_initial_requirements: Verify config contracts match the redesign spec and do not allow project-level apiKey.
review_regression_requirements: Run focused config tests and TypeScript build.

title: Read global configuration file
description: Implement global config loading from ~/.autob/config.json with missing-file fallback.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN ~/.autob/config.json exists THEN readGlobalConfig returns parsed config; WHEN it is missing THEN readGlobalConfig returns an empty config without throwing; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:13
review_initial_requirements: Verify global path handling supports injected home directories for tests and does not print secrets.
review_regression_requirements: Run focused config tests and TypeScript build.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md; source_simple_csv:CONF-2; picked_reason:P0 global config reader unlocks init/config show/CLI JSON config loading; done_at:2026-06-09; skills_used:test-driven-development;security-and-hardening;verification-before-completion; mcp_used:none-required; tdd_red:npm test -- tests/config.test.ts failed on missing readGlobalConfig; review_initial:readGlobalConfig uses injected homeDir/default homedir and returns empty object on missing ~/.autob/config.json without printing secrets; review_regression:npm test -- tests/config.test.ts exit0 1 file 4 tests; npm run build exit0; graphify_update:graphify update . exit0 rebuilt 310 nodes 584 edges

title: Read project configuration file
description: Implement project config loading from ./.autob.json with missing-file fallback and validation.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN .autob.json exists THEN readProjectConfig returns parsed non-sensitive overrides; WHEN missing THEN it returns an empty config; WHEN apiKey appears in project config THEN validation fails; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:14
review_initial_requirements: Verify project config reads from injected cwd and rejects project-level secrets.
review_regression_requirements: Run focused config tests and TypeScript build.

title: Merge global and project configuration
description: Implement shallow llm-object merge where project non-sensitive fields override global fields.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN global and project configs both define llm values THEN mergeConfig keeps global apiKey and applies project model/baseUrl/timeoutMs overrides; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:15
review_initial_requirements: Verify merge behavior preserves global apiKey and uses project values only for allowed fields.
review_regression_requirements: Run focused config tests and TypeScript build.

title: Remove environment variable configuration path
description: Remove old AUTOBIO_LLM, DEEPSEEK, and OPENAI environment-variable parsing from the CLI configuration module.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN config module is searched THEN resolveLlmConfigFromEnv and createLlmClientFromEnv are absent; WHEN LLM config is loaded THEN it comes from JSON config only; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:16
review_initial_requirements: Verify removed env helpers are not imported by CLI or runner.
review_regression_requirements: Run config, CLI, inference, E2E tests and TypeScript build.

title: Create LLM client from loaded JSON config
description: Wire loaded merged config into OpenAI-compatible LLM client creation for infer and run commands.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN merged config has llm.apiKey/baseUrl/model THEN infer and run construct an OpenAiCompatibleLlmClient; WHEN config is absent THEN pipeline degrades gracefully as not-configured; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:16
review_initial_requirements: Verify CLI uses loaded config once per command and never logs API keys.
review_regression_requirements: Run config, CLI, inference, E2E tests and TypeScript build.
